# llms.txt — Winning Adventure Global

## Site Overview

Winning Adventure Global connects Australian businesses with verified Chinese manufacturers across all industries. We accompany businesses on factory tours in Shenzhen, Guangzhou, and Shanghai, providing supplier verification, translation support, and end-to-end procurement services.

## Organization

- **Legal Name**: WINNING ADVENTURE GLOBAL PTY LTD
- **ABN**: 94 697 886 150
- **ACN**: 697 886 150
- **Address**: 5/54 Melbourne St, North Adelaide SA 5006, Australia
- **Phone**: +61-416588198
- **Email**: info@winningadventure.com.au
- **Founded**: 2025

## Services

- Factory tours in Shenzhen, Guangzhou, Shanghai
- Supplier verification and business license vetting
- Sample coordination and shipping
- Quality inspection (pre-shipment)
- Contract review and payment terms support
- Shipping and customs clearance guidance

## Key Pages

- **Homepage**: https://www.winningadventure.com.au/
- **Services**: https://www.winningadventure.com.au/services
- **About**: https://www.winningadventure.com.au/about
- **Resources**: https://www.winningadventure.com.au/resources
- **Enquiry**: https://www.winningadventure.com.au/enquiry

## Service Categories

Factory tours, supplier verification, procurement support, factory visit coordination, quality inspection, sample management

## Geographic Focus

Factory tours primarily in Pearl River Delta (Shenzhen, Guangzhou, Dongguan) and Yangtze River Delta (Shanghai). Services for Australian businesses importing from China.

## Team

- **Andy Liu** — Founder. China manufacturing expertise across Shenzhen, Foshan, Guangzhou, Pearl River Delta.
- **Mark He** — Managing Director (Adelaide). Covers factory visits, supplier verification, import compliance, and China sourcing strategy.
